name: timeline
description: Timeline block for displaying chronological events.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of timeline events to display. Each item has a title and optional id, description, timestamp, icon, and status. Provide id for stable list reconciliation.

props.name: showLine
props.description: Whether to render the vertical connecting line between timeline dots.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outermost container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded to the outermost container.
